title: Partnerships for inclusion of neurodiversity in schools (PINS)
body: "This information is for those taking part in the partnerships for inclusion of neurodiversity in schools (PINS) programme, including:   integrated care boards local authorities schools parent carer forums, or other parent carer-led groups   It is relevant to those:   starting a new PINS project in the 2025 to 2026 financial year continuing an existing PINS project    "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
